examples.code:
# Deep copy vs Shallow copy of nested lists
import copy
original = [[1, 2], [3, 4]]
shallow = original.copy()
deep = copy.deepcopy(original)

original[0][0] = 99
print('Shallow affected:', shallow[0][0]) # 99
print('Deep unaffected:', deep[0][0])     # 1
examples.explanation: Shallow copy copies outer array of pointers; deepcopy recursively duplicates nested objects.
